strategy: Expect a Ghulture minion each of the first three Rounds, then Guardian Spirit on all three (revive at 33% after defeat).
Carry Entangle to strip one Guardian Spirit per cast before you kill the minions, or AoE the whole board at once so they fall together.
Attack with Fire, Ice, Storm, or Myth. She only resists Life and Death (15%), so hit into anything else.
At 4,560 Health, blade once and AoE everything after clearing the Guardian Spirits.
Enter on time so you do not eat her late-join Luminous Weaver.
cheatNotes: On each of the first three Rounds she shadow-summons a Death or Myth Ghulture minion.
Once all three are out she gives them Guardian Spirit, reviving each at 33% Health after defeat.
Cast Entangle to strip one Guardian Spirit per cast before you kill the minions.
A wizard who joins late gets hit with Luminous Weaver.
